agreementRule.plainLanguage: Student email must not be sent to a destination prohibited by the confirmed agreement.
agreementRule.quotedText: Student email is restricted to agreement-authorized service providers.

finding.label: Recorded conflict in this named test
finding.meaning: Pactwire recorded a data flow that conflicts with this confirmed test rule.

content.nextHumanDecision: A human reviewer must review the recorded conflict and decide whether the software approval should change.

limitations: Only the controlled fictional student journey was exercised.
This finding is limited to the named Student submits fictional assignment journey for the student role.
visiblePaths: Student sees the fictional submission complete
